summary.en: Founded 1998 by Larry Page and Sergey Brin; launched paid search ads (AdWords) in 2000, turning Google into a 2-sided platform (searchers + advertisers); launched AdSense in 2003, adding the third side (content sites) and creating the textbook 3-sided MSP. As of 2025 Alphabet earns ~80% of revenue from these advertising mechanisms. Strategyzer's flagship MSP example. The case shows three BMCs — one per customer side — to make the asymmetric pricing logic legible: searchers get the platform free, advertisers pay an auction-clearing price, content sites earn a revenue share.
summary.zh: 由 Larry Page 和 Sergey Brin 在 1998 年创立。2000 年推出搜索广告(AdWords),把 Google 变成了双边平台(搜索者 + 广告主);2003 年推出 AdSense,加入第三边(内容站点),正式形成教科书级的三边 MSP。截至 2025 年,Alphabet 约 80% 的收入来自这套广告机制。Strategyzer《商业模式新生代》中多边平台的旗舰示例。本案例用三张 BMC —— 每张展示一边客户的视角 —— 把不对称定价逻辑讲清楚:搜索者免费用平台、广告主以竞价出清的价格付费、内容站点拿走分成的部分。

sources.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (pp. 76-81)
Eisenmann, Parker & Van Alstyne · 'Strategies for Two-Sided Markets' · Harvard Business Review · October 2006
Steven Levy · In the Plex: How Google Thinks, Works, and Shapes Our Lives · Simon & Schuster · 2011
